Operation 'identifyUser' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (which parameters are mandatory) and what the operation returns. Added explicit input requirements, clarification that this enables cross-session/device recognition, and confirmation of return value for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Associates a Heap user_id with an identity (such as an email or username). This merges the anonymous user data with the identified user.
data.description_suggestion: Associates a Heap user_id with an identity (such as an email or username) to link anonymous and identified user data. Requires either user_id or identity parameter. Merges historical anonymous user data with the identified user profile. Returns success confirmation. This operation enables user recognition across sessions and devices.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on required inputs (which parameters are mandatory) and what the operation returns. Added explicit input requirements, clarification that this enables cross-session/device recognition, and confirmation of return value for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'bulkAddUserProperties' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Description is incomplete regarding input requirements (how users are identified) and side effects (whether new users are created like the single operation). Added clarity on user identification methods, automatic user creation behavior consistency with single operation, and rate limiting context for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Attaches custom properties to multiple users in a single request. Maximum 1000 users per request.
data.description_suggestion: Attaches custom properties to multiple users in a single request. Maximum 1000 users per request. Requires user identities or user_ids for each entry. If an identity does not exist, a new user is created. Returns success confirmation. Rate limiting applies per app_id.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete regarding input requirements (how users are identified) and side effects (whether new users are created like the single operation). Added clarity on user identification methods, automatic user creation behavior consistency with single operation, and rate limiting context for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'addAccountProperties' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is vague about how accounts are identified and what the operation returns. Added clarity on account identification method (account_id), explicit return value, and side effect behavior (account creation) consistent with user properties operations. This helps AI agents understand input/output requirements and when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Attaches custom properties to an account. Supports single account or bulk updates (up to 1000 accounts).
data.description_suggestion: Attaches custom properties to one or more accounts in a single request. Supports single account updates or bulk updates up to 1000 accounts per request. Requires account_id for each account. Returns success confirmation. If an account does not exist, a new account is created.

This helps AI agents understand input/output requirements and when to use this operation.
